hero.title: Neo Labs
hero.tagline: Accessible digital solutions for your business.

about.title: About
about.description: Neo Labs Agency builds scalable digital products for startups and businesses. We focus on modern technologies, performance, and automation — from web applications and SaaS platforms to bots and API integrations. Our goal is to deliver solutions that are both powerful and maintainable, so you can focus on growing your business.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: End-to-end digital solutions to grow your business.

web.title: Web development
web.description: Custom business websites, landing pages, and high-performance web applications.

saas.title: SaaS product development
saas.description: Full-cycle SaaS development from idea to scalable product.

bots.title: Bot development
bots.description: Telegram, Discord, and automation bots for business workflows.

api.title: API integration
api.description: Integration with external APIs, automation systems, and cloud services.

staffing.title: Tech staffing & hiring
staffing.description: Find and onboard developers for your existing project. We handle sourcing, vetting, and hiring.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Web apps, SaaS dashboards, and mobile solutions we've built.

contact.title: Start Your
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your idea and we'll get back to you.
